title: Veterans Access to Direct Primary Care Act
short_title: Veterans Access to Direct Primary Care Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.
crs_summary: Veterans Access to Direct Primary Care Act This bill requires the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to implement a five-year pilot program to provide veterans who are enrolled in the VA health care system with the option to receive primary care services from a non-VA health care provider under a direct primary care service arrangement and pay using a veteran health savings account.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.
